matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-004 title: user login with valid credentials module: user source pages: 2 preconditions: a user has been registered. test data: - email: example@example.com - password: strongpassword123 test steps: 1. enter the email and password in the login form. 2. click on the login button. 3. wait for the firebase authentication response. 4. check if the user is logged in successfully. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully, and the system should return the firebaseuser.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user registration with valid inputs module: user source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - email: example@example.com - password: strongpassword123 test steps: 1. enter email and password in the registration form. 2. click on the registration button. 3. wait for the createuserwithemailandpassword activity to complete. 4. check if the user is created successfully. expected result: the user should be registered successfully, and the system should return the firebaseuser and userid.

test case id: tc-firebasesdk-002 title: event listener for missions - failed response module: firebase sdk source pages: 5 preconditions: a listener is added for mission events. test data: - mission: id=1, titolo="first mission", superato=false test steps: 1. add a value event listener for mission events. 2. simulate a failure in the realtime database processing. 3. wait for the realtime database to trigger the event. 4. receive the response from the realtime database. 5. check if the response indicates an error. expected result: the response should indicate an error in the processing of the mission event. note: these test cases cover all the described elements and flows across the provided uml diagrams. edge cases and negative scenarios have been included where applicable. <|assistant|>

test case id: tc-realtimedatabase-002 title: asynchronous data handling - failed response module: realtime database source pages: 4 preconditions: a hashmap is sent to the realtime database. test data: - hashmap: {"key": "value"} test steps: 1. send the hashmap to the realtime database. 2. wait for the realtime database to convert it to json. 3. simulate a failure in the realtime database processing. 4. receive the response from the realtime database. 5. check if the response indicates an error. expected result: the response should indicate an error in the processing of the hashmap.

test case id: tc-firebasesdk-001 title: event listener for missions - successful response module: firebase sdk source pages: 5 preconditions: a listener is added for mission events. test data: - mission: id=1, titolo="first mission", superato=false test steps: 1. add a value event listener for mission events. 2. wait for the realtime database to trigger the event. 3. receive the response from the realtime database. 4. check if the response is successful. expected result: the response should indicate a successful handling of the mission event.

test case id: tc-ranking-001 title: user completes a ranking module: ranking source pages: 1 preconditions: a user is logged in and a ranking exists. test data: - user: example@example.com - ranking: id=1, titolo="first ranking", superato=false test steps: 1. log in as the user. 2. complete the ranking. 3. check if the ranking is marked as superato. expected result: the ranking should be marked as superato for the user.

test case id: tc-user-005 title: user login with invalid credentials module: user source pages: 2 preconditions: a user has been registered. test data: - email: example@example.com - password: incorrectpassword test steps: 1. enter the email and an incorrect password in the login form. 2. click on the login button. 3. observe the error message. expected result: an error message should be displayed indicating that the password is incorrect.

test case id: tc-mission-001 title: user completes a mission with a tip module: mission source pages: 1 preconditions: a user is logged in and a mission exists. test data: - user: example@example.com - mission: id=1, titolo="first mission", superato=false, descrizione="complete the task" - tip: id=1, titolo="tip for mission" test steps: 1. log in as the user. 2. complete the mission using the tip. 3. check if the mission is marked as superato. expected result: the mission should be marked as superato for the user.
